content:
🚀 This version deepens the RPG mechanics by adding weekly debuffs, unlockable streak rewards, difficulty scaling, sabotage/saving mechanics, and collective unconscious elements.

📜 1. Weekly Buffs & Debuffs for Character Archetypes

📜 Each week will now include:
✔ Buffs for certain archetypes (bonuses on skill checks, XP multipliers, special privileges).
✔ Debuffs for others (increased penalties for failure, movement restrictions, disadvantage rolls).

Example: Week 4 – Gothic Literature & the Subconscious
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 176 (chunk 176/555)
